structure.description: Hero composes name + platform/kind icon + environment badge (PROD/DEV/STAGING) + breadcrumb path + aggregated health badges into a single identity strip. Each fragment is independently meaningful but read together as 'who this thing is'.

rationale.hypothesis: When the same logical name (e.g. 'orders') exists in multiple platforms × environments × domains, the name alone is not identity. The user must see all axes simultaneously to be sure they are looking at the right entity.

evidence.description: Dataset hero: name + Snowflake icon + PROD badge + db.schema.table breadcrumb + deprecated/incident badges
Issue hero: title + project icon + env badge + level badge
Pod hero: name + cluster + namespace + status

counterexample.description: If name is globally unique within app, composite identity is redundant

shouldNotMatch.reason: MoodEntry has only date — single coordinate
